name: Patrice O'Neal
bio: Patrice ONeal was an American stand-up comedian and actor known for confrontational, unfiltered material on relationships, race, and gender, often built from live deconstruction of the audience. A regular on Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn and the Opie and Anthony radio show, he built a devoted following before his one-hour special Elephant in the Room aired in 2011. He died later that year at age 41 from complications of a stroke linked to type 2 diabetes.

timeline.ev: Becomes a regular on Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn
Elephant in the Room special premieres February 19

accolades: Acclaimed for Elephant in the Room (2011)
Subject of Comedy Central documentary Killing Is Easy (2021)
